expectations.evidence: Did not flag Firebase or Streamlit. Said script was 'correct and natural' with 'no changes needed'
Recommended ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 as primary — paid API. gTTS as free fallback, not Edge TTS Noemi
No MP3-to-WAV conversion mentioned — ElevenLabs returns base64, gTTS path not detailed
Whisper mentioned as fallback but language= parameter not specified
Mentioned useCurrentFrame()/fps for Remotion and seconds-based timestamp lookup
